title: timonius trichocaulon
intro: Timonius trichocaulon is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the Borneo calamus. The plant has been traditionally used in various parts of Asia for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Timonius trichocaulon include the treatment of fever, diarrhea, and various skin conditions, as well as its use as a local anesthetic. Timonius trichocaulon is often prepared for medicinal use by making teas, infusions, or decoctions from its rhizomes and leaves, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to affected areas.
